{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Supervisor",
  "description": "Fresh2Go Smoothie &amp; Co. is a fast growing food and beverage brand focused on delivering fresh, tasty, and affordable meals and drinks. We operate multiple outlets and specialize in smoothies, milkshakes, sandwiches, shawarma, parfaits, burgers, and other ready to eat meals made with quality ingredients.

Our company is driven by a strong commitment to hygiene, customer satisfaction, and operational excellence. We create a dynamic and supportive work environment where teamwork, innovation, and personal growth are encouraged. At Fresh2Go, employees are valued as key contributors to our success, and we are passionate about building a brand that customers trust and talents are proud to be part of.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Supervisor
Job Location: Ibadan, Jericho - Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are in need of a supervisor to oversee the daily operations of the outlet, ensuring smooth service delivery, staff supervision, sales performance, hygiene compliance, inventory control, and excellent customer experience.


Key Responsibilities


	Handle stock taking and inventory management effectively
	Prepare and submit weekly/monthly reports
	Customer service-oriented
	Compliance and safety management
	Supervise and lead a team efficiently
	Ensure staff comply with food safety &amp; hygiene
	Monitor daily sales performance
	Monitor product quality, portioning, and consistency of smoothies


Requirements


	Minimum qualifications: OND, HND/BSc in any discipline
	1-2 years of experience as a supervisor, especially in a food retail company
	Strong leadership
	Good communication skills
	Proficient in Excel
	Organizational skill
	Close attention to details.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their application (CV and brief cover letter) to: oluwatomisin668@gmail.com using &quot;Supervisor&#39; as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-06-15",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Fresh2Go Smoothie & Co."
    
  },

      "@type": "PostalAddress",

      "addressCountry": "NG"

  },

    "value": "200042"
  },

    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",

    }

}



Supervisor Job at Fresh2Go Smoothie & Co.




        
    

        
        Fresh2Go Smoothie & Co. is a fast growing food and beverage brand focused on delivering fresh, tasty, and affordable meals and drinks. We operate multiple outlets and specialize in smoothies, milkshakes, sandwiches, shawarma, parfaits, burgers, and other ready to eat meals made with quality ingredients.

Our company is driven by a strong commitment to hygiene, customer satisfaction, and operational excellence. We create a dynamic and supportive work environment where teamwork, innovation, and personal growth are encouraged. At Fresh2Go, employees are valued as key contributors to our success, and we are passionate about building a brand that customers trust and talents are proud to be part of.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Supervisor
Job Location: Ibadan, Jericho - Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are in need of a supervisor to oversee the daily operations of the outlet, ensuring smooth service delivery, staff supervision, sales performance, hygiene compliance, inventory control, and excellent customer experience.


Key Responsibilities


	Handle stock taking and inventory management effectively
	Prepare and submit weekly/monthly reports
	Customer service-oriented
	Compliance and safety management
	Supervise and lead a team efficiently
	Ensure staff comply with food safety & hygiene
	Monitor daily sales performance
	Monitor product quality, portioning, and consistency of smoothies


Requirements


	Minimum qualifications: OND, HND/BSc in any discipline
	1-2 years of experience as a supervisor, especially in a food retail company
	Strong leadership
	Good communication skills
	Proficient in Excel
	Organizational skill
	Close attention to details.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their application (CV and brief cover letter) to: [email protected] using "Supervisor' as the subject of the mail.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "CNG Business Development Manager",
  "description": "Matrix Energy Group is a rapidly growing indigenous and integrated Oil Marketing and Trading Company in Nigeria, which was incorporated November 25, 2004.

Over the years, Matrix Energy has grown from a modest supply and distributions operation to a fully integrated petroleum products marketing and trading company with clients and suppliers all over the world.

We are recruiting to fill the academic position below:

Job Position: CNG Business Development Manager

Job Opening ID: MEL1192
Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Job Type: Full time

Job Description
Project Development &amp; Execution:


	Oversee the end-to-end development of the CNG business, from conceptualization through to commissioning.
	Engage and coordinate with contractors, consultants, and regulatory bodies to ensure projects are delivered safely on time and within budget.
	Monitor project schedules, budgets, and quality standards while providing regular progress reports to management and stakeholders.
	Ensure full compliance with all statutory and industry safety standards and proactively manage any risks associated with project execution.
	&nbsp;Develop and implement risk management strategies to identify potential obstacles and ensure proactive solutions.


Commercial Development:


	Develop and implement strategic marketing plans to position the company as a preferred CNG supplier in the marketplace.
	Identify, onboard, and develop new customer relationships, negotiate commercial agreements, and manage key client portfolios effectively.
	Lead contract negotiations and administration, ensuring favorable terms are established and compliance with company policies is maintained.
	Develop pricing strategies that reflect market conditions and oversee timely and accurate invoices and revenue collection to optimize cash flow.
	Conduct market analysis and competitive benchmarking to inform business strategies and identify growth opportunities.


Team Leadership &amp; Collaboration:


	Build, lead, and motivate a small team to achieve both technical and commercial objectives
	Provide clear direction, support, coaching, and performance management to team members, fostering a culture of continuous improvement.
	Encourage collaboration within the team and with internal and external stakeholders to drive project success and innovation.
	Conduct regular team meetings to align objectives, share best practices, and encourage knowledge sharing.


Reporting &amp; Compliance:


	Prepare and present comprehensive reports on project status, commercial performance, risks, and mitigation measures to management.
	Ensure compliance with all legal, regulatory, and company-specific requirements pertaining to CNG operations, maintaining high ethical standards.
	Contribute to the development of company policies and procedures concerning CNG operations to enhance operational efficiency.


Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Engineering, Business Administration, or a related field.
	A Master&#39;s degree and a relevant professional certification is an added advantages.
	Proven experience in the CNG sector or similar energy-related fields, with a solid understanding of industry trends and regulatory frameworks.


Skills Requirements:


	Entrepreneurial mindset with strong problem-solving capabilities.
	Demonstrated ability to build and lead teams effectively while promoting a collaborative work environment.
	Ability to work independently and make sound commercial and technical decisions.
	Excellent verbal and written communication skills
	Strong analytical and financial acumen.
	Commitment to high standards of integrity, safety, and sustainability.
	In-depth understanding of regulatory requirements in the CNG sector.&nbsp;
	Negotiation and Relationship Management Skills
	Ability to efficiently manage and develop client portfolios.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-06-06",
  "validThrough": "2026-07-07",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Matrix Energy Group"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",

       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Rivers (PH)",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },

  },

CNG Business Development Manager Job at Matrix Energy Group




        
    

        
        Matrix Energy Group is a rapidly growing indigenous and integrated Oil Marketing and Trading Company in Nigeria, which was incorporated November 25, 2004.

Over the years, Matrix Energy has grown from a modest supply and distributions operation to a fully integrated petroleum products marketing and trading company with clients and suppliers all over the world.

We are recruiting to fill the academic position below:

Job Position: CNG Business Development Manager

Job Opening ID: MEL1192
Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Job Type: Full time

Job Description
Project Development & Execution:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Oversee the end-to-end development of the CNG business, from conceptualization through to commissioning.
	Engage and coordinate with contractors, consultants, and regulatory bodies to ensure projects are delivered safely on time and within budget.
	Monitor project schedules, budgets, and quality standards while providing regular progress reports to management and stakeholders.
	Ensure full compliance with all statutory and industry safety standards and proactively manage any risks associated with project execution.
	 Develop and implement risk management strategies to identify potential obstacles and ensure proactive solutions.


Commercial Development:


	Develop and implement strategic marketing plans to position the company as a preferred CNG supplier in the marketplace.
	Identify, onboard, and develop new customer relationships, negotiate commercial agreements, and manage key client portfolios effectively.
	Lead contract negotiations and administration, ensuring favorable terms are established and compliance with company policies is maintained.
	Develop pricing strategies that reflect market conditions and oversee timely and accurate invoices and revenue collection to optimize cash flow.
	Conduct market analysis and competitive benchmarking to inform business strategies and identify growth opportunities.


Team Leadership & Collaboration:


	Build, lead, and motivate a small team to achieve both technical and commercial objectives
	Provide clear direction, support, coaching, and performance management to team members, fostering a culture of continuous improvement.
	Encourage collaboration within the team and with internal and external stakeholders to drive project success and innovation.
	Conduct regular team meetings to align objectives, share best practices, and encourage knowledge sharing.


Reporting & Compliance:


	Prepare and present comprehensive reports on project status, commercial performance, risks, and mitigation measures to management.
	Ensure compliance with all legal, regulatory, and company-specific requirements pertaining to CNG operations, maintaining high ethical standards.
	Contribute to the development of company policies and procedures concerning CNG operations to enhance operational efficiency.


Qualifications


	Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering, Business Administration, or a related field.
	A Master's degree and a relevant professional certification is an added advantages.
	Proven experience in the CNG sector or similar energy-related fields, with a solid understanding of industry trends and regulatory frameworks.


Skills Requirements:


	Entrepreneurial mindset with strong problem-solving capabilities.
	Demonstrated ability to build and lead teams effectively while promoting a collaborative work environment.
	Ability to work independently and make sound commercial and technical decisions.
	Excellent verbal and written communication skills
	Strong analytical and financial acumen.
	Commitment to high standards of integrity, safety, and sustainability.
	In-depth understanding of regulatory requirements in the CNG sector. 
	Negotiation and Relationship Management Skills
	Ability to efficiently manage and develop client portfolios.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Managing Director",
  "description": "Mecer Consulting Limited is a world class Business consulting firm with specialty in SME consulting, Human Capital Development and Business Growth, Business Re-engineering, Merger and Acquisition.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Managing Director
Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Managing Director will provide leadership for the cooperative, drive membership growth, manage credit and loan operations, supervise staff, strengthen financial controls, and ensure profitable and sustainable operations.


Key Responsibilities


	Lead the day-to-day operations of the cooperative and report to the Board/Executive Committee.
	Drive membership growth, savings mobilisation and business development.
	Oversee loan marketing, appraisal, disbursement, monitoring and recovery.
	Supervise accounting, financial reporting, cash management and internal controls.
	Manage staff performance, teamwork, discipline and service delivery.
	Ensure proper documentation, compliance, risk management and audit readiness.
	Build relationships with members, groups, businesses and institutions within Kubwa and surrounding areas.


Qualifications and Experience


	First degree in Accounting, Banking &amp; Finance, Economics, Business Administration, Marketing, Cooperative Management or another commercial/social science-related course.
	Minimum of 7 years of relevant experience, with at least 5 years in management in a financial institution, microfinance bank, cooperative or credit organisation.
	Strong experience in marketing, credit administration, accounting, loans management and team leadership.


Required Skills:


	Mature, confident, agile, self-driven and target-oriented.
	Strong leadership, communication and team management skills.
	Good knowledge of cooperative operations, credit, loans, accounting and financial controls.
	Ability to manage members, staff and difficult conversations professionally.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: recruitment@mecer.consulting using &quot;Managing Director&quot; as the subject of the email.",

Managing Director Job at Mecer Consulting Limited




        
    

        
        Mecer Consulting Limited is a world class Business consulting firm with specialty in SME consulting, Human Capital Development and Business Growth, Business Re-engineering, Merger and Acquisition.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Managing Director
Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Managing Director will provide leadership for the cooperative, drive membership growth, manage credit and loan operations, supervise staff, strengthen financial controls, and ensure profitable and sustainable operations.


Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Lead the day-to-day operations of the cooperative and report to the Board/Executive Committee.
	Drive membership growth, savings mobilisation and business development.
	Oversee loan marketing, appraisal, disbursement, monitoring and recovery.
	Supervise accounting, financial reporting, cash management and internal controls.
	Manage staff performance, teamwork, discipline and service delivery.
	Ensure proper documentation, compliance, risk management and audit readiness.
	Build relationships with members, groups, businesses and institutions within Kubwa and surrounding areas.


Qualifications and Experience


	First degree in Accounting, Banking & Finance, Economics, Business Administration, Marketing, Cooperative Management or another commercial/social science-related course.
	Minimum of 7 years of relevant experience, with at least 5 years in management in a financial institution, microfinance bank, cooperative or credit organisation.
	Strong experience in marketing, credit administration, accounting, loans management and team leadership.


Required Skills:


	Mature, confident, agile, self-driven and target-oriented.
	Strong leadership, communication and team management skills.
	Good knowledge of cooperative operations, credit, loans, accounting and financial controls.
	Ability to manage members, staff and difficult conversations professionally.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Managing Director" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Waiter & Waitress",
  "description": "Fresh2Go Smoothie &amp; Co. is a fast growing food and beverage brand focused on delivering fresh, tasty, and affordable meals and drinks. We operate multiple outlets and specialize in smoothies, milkshakes, sandwiches, shawarma, parfaits, burgers, and other ready to eat meals made with quality ingredients.

Our company is driven by a strong commitment to hygiene, customer satisfaction, and operational excellence. We create a dynamic and supportive work environment where teamwork, innovation, and personal growth are encouraged. At Fresh2Go, employees are valued as key contributors to our success, and we are passionate about building a brand that customers trust and talents are proud to be part of.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Waiter &amp; Waitress

Job Location: Ibadan, Akala - Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Summary


	We are seeking dedicated, fun-loving waiters and waitresses to help make our restaurant a success.


Key Responsibilities


	Greet guests, take drinks and food orders.
	Stay attentive to the needs of guests.
	Deliver food from the kitchen to the guests.
	Ensure that the food order is prepared correctly by the kitchen staff and presented in a presentable manner for guests.
	Follow health code standards about the handling of food.
	Perform duties like delivering racks of cups to the service station, rolling silverware, wiping tables, and removing debris


Qualifications


	OND, HND / BSc in any discipline.
	Neat and decent looking
	Good communication skills
	Good customer relationship.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and cover letter to: oluwatomisin668@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Waiter & Waitress Job at Fresh2Go Smoothie & Co.




        
    

        
        Fresh2Go Smoothie & Co. is a fast growing food and beverage brand focused on delivering fresh, tasty, and affordable meals and drinks. We operate multiple outlets and specialize in smoothies, milkshakes, sandwiches, shawarma, parfaits, burgers, and other ready to eat meals made with quality ingredients.

Our company is driven by a strong commitment to hygiene, customer satisfaction, and operational excellence. We create a dynamic and supportive work environment where teamwork, innovation, and personal growth are encouraged. At Fresh2Go, employees are valued as key contributors to our success, and we are passionate about building a brand that customers trust and talents are proud to be part of.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Waiter & Waitress

Job Location: Ibadan, Akala - Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Summary


	We are seeking dedicated, fun-loving waiters and waitresses to help make our restaurant a success.


Key Responsibilities


	Greet guests, take drinks and food orders.
	Stay attentive to the needs of guests.
	Deliver food from the kitchen to the guests.
	Ensure that the food order is prepared correctly by the kitchen staff and presented in a presentable manner for guests.
	Follow health code standards about the handling of food.
	Perform duties like delivering racks of cups to the service station, rolling silverware, wiping tables, and removing debris


Qualifications


	OND, HND / BSc in any discipline.
	Neat and decent looking
	Good communication skills
	Good customer relationship.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and cover letter to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Cashier",
  "description": "Rayfield Medical Services Limited is a healthcare provider located in Jos, Plateau State, Nigeria. We are committed to delivering quality medical care through a team of qualified professionals and modern facilities across various clinical and support departments.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Cashier

Job Location: Jos, Plateau
Employment Type: Full-time, Shift duty

Job Summary


	Rayfield Medical Services Limited is a healthcare provider located in Jos, Plateau State, Nigeria.
	We are recruiting a Cashier to handle financial transactions and maintain accurate records.


Responsibilities


	Receiving and recording all payments from patients and clients
	Daily cash reconciliation and balancing of cash registers
	Maintains accurate transaction records and financial reports
	Issuing receipts and invoices as required
	Ensuring compliance with hospital financial policies and procedures.


Qualifications &amp; Skills


	Degree in Accounting, Business Administration or related fields
	Minimum of 3 years of cashiering or billing experience.
	Healthcare experience preferred
	Proficiency in computer applications and MS Office is essential
	Strong attention to detail and numerical accuracy
	Good communication and customer service skills
	Ability to work in shifts including weekends/holidays.


Other Requirements:


	Applicants must be resident in Jos or willing to relocate.
	Must be able to work shift duty


Remuneration
Compensation is competitive and commensurate with qualifications and experience. Performance-based incentives may apply.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their Cover Letter and CV via email to: adminrms@rayfieldmedical.com.ng using &ldquo;Cashier - Accounting Department&rdquo; as the subject of the email.
Or
Submit hardcopies to:
Rayfield Medical Services Limited,

Cashier Job at Rayfield Medical Services Limited




        
    

        
        Rayfield Medical Services Limited is a healthcare provider located in Jos, Plateau State, Nigeria. We are committed to delivering quality medical care through a team of qualified professionals and modern facilities across various clinical and support departments.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Cashier

Job Location: Jos, Plateau
Employment Type: Full-time, Shift duty

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Rayfield Medical Services Limited is a healthcare provider located in Jos, Plateau State, Nigeria.
	We are recruiting a Cashier to handle financial transactions and maintain accurate records.


Responsibilities


	Receiving and recording all payments from patients and clients
	Daily cash reconciliation and balancing of cash registers
	Maintains accurate transaction records and financial reports
	Issuing receipts and invoices as required
	Ensuring compliance with hospital financial policies and procedures.


Qualifications & Skills


	Degree in Accounting, Business Administration or related fields
	Minimum of 3 years of cashiering or billing experience.
	Healthcare experience preferred
	Proficiency in computer applications and MS Office is essential
	Strong attention to detail and numerical accuracy
	Good communication and customer service skills
	Ability to work in shifts including weekends/holidays.


Other Requirements:


	Applicants must be resident in Jos or willing to relocate.
	Must be able to work shift duty


Remuneration
Compensation is competitive and commensurate with qualifications and experience. Performance-based incentives may apply.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their Cover Letter and CV via email to: [email protected] using “Cashier - Accounting Department” as the subject of the email.
Or
Submit hardcopies to:
Rayfield Medical Services Limited,
No. 30 Raphael Davou Street,
Fwavwei Rayfield,
Jos, Plateau State.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply
